title: Pehkui Presets
description: Adding commands that change your size - powered by Pehkui!
body:
This is a mod that adds presets for the mod [Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui)!

/big - Runs the command /scale set pehkui:base 1 @p

/small - Runs the command /scale set pehkui:base 0.06 @p

Hope you enjoy!

This was made in MCreator (Except the Fabric version). Download it [here](https://mcreator.net/).

Fun Fact: I coded the Fabric version myself.
